category_sources: Official GitHub README says the project includes a FUSE program plus extract/import tool for 3DS save data.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README names the FUSE program and extract/import tool save3ds_fuse.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents usage and modes for save3ds_fuse.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/wwylele/save3ds; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it is written in Rust and includes library plus FUSE/extract/import tool.
source_facts.description identifies FUSE and 3DS save/extdata/database operations.
